# Data processing script^M
^M
# Check if input data exists^M

    # Process the data^M
    cat /data/output/raw_data.txt | tr 'a-z' 'A-Z' > /data/output/processed_data.txt^M
    echo "Data processed successfully!"^M
    exit 0^M
else^M
    echo "Error: Input data not found!"^M
    exit 1^M
